name: Before/After Reveal
camera_block: split-screen or transition shot, smooth transition from before to after, steady during reveal moment, wide enough to show full transformation
motion_block: presenting the result clearly with hands, slight lean toward camera for emphasis, deliberate reveal motion, visible satisfaction with result
performance_block: dramatic pause before reveal, moment to let result sink in, build-up then satisfying reveal, excited proud of result, genuine amazement at transformation
platform_block: high-impact TikTok transformation reveal, organic UGC pacing, not polished commercial
audio_block: dramatic reveal sounds, satisfying result sounds, excited creator tone
negative_prompt_block: no robotic reveal, no stiff movement, no overproduced commercial reveal, no cinematic transition effects
